title: Kharzet III
content:
{{Top|leg|notoc=1}} {{CelestialBody |image=[[File:Rebel_probe_ship_-_Kharzet_III.jpg]] |name=Kharzet III |region=[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Kharzet system/Legends|Kharzet system]] |sector=[[Mortex sector/Legends|Mortex sector]] |system=[[Kharzet system/Legends|Kharzet system]] |coordinates=R-4 |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position= |moons= |routes= |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class=Terrestrial[[Star Wars (1977) 51|''Star Wars'' (1977) 51]] |diameter= |atmosphere=[[Atmosphere/Legends#Type I atmospheres|Type I]] {{C|breathable}} |climate= |gravity= |terrain=[[Forest/Legends|Rainforests]] |water= |interest= |flora= |fauna=[[Long-necked gundark]] |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|This planet does look promising, though. It has lots of shelter for concealment, lots of plant life for provisions, and lots of—"
"Gundarks!|Leia Organa and C-3PO, upon landing on Kharzet III|}} '''Kharzet III''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]' [[Mortex sector/Legends|Mortex sector]] that was uncharted as of [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. The planet's lush forests were home a wide variety of plant life, and also to a unique [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Gundark/Legends|gundark]] known as the [[long-necked gundark]].[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']] [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] scouted the planet for possible new location for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] base after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], but they they quickly fled after coming under attacked by long-necked gundarks. ==Behind the scenes== Kharzet III first appeared in [[Star Wars (1977) 51|''Star Wars 51: Resurrection of Evil'']], written by [[Archie Goodwin]] and released in [[1981]]. Although the planet went unidentified in its initial appearance, it later received a name in the 2001 reference book ''[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|The Essential Guide to Alien Species]]'', which mentioned the unique gundark species shown in the comic. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars (1977) 51|''Star Wars'' (1977) 51]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 51}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']] {{1stID|Kharzet III}} *''[[The New Essential Guide to Alien Species]]'' *{{CSWECite|III||Kimdyara, Kin}} ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Kharzet III}} {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Kharzet III |es=Kharzet III |pt=Kharzet III }} [[Category:Mortex sector locations]] [[Category:Planets in the Outer Rim Territories]] [[Category:Planets in the Trans-Hydian Borderlands]] [[Category:Terrestrial planets]] [[Category:Type I atmosphere planets]]
